title: Edwardsia tetraptera
taxonomy: Edwardsia tetraptera is a species of sea anemone in the phylum Cnidaria, specifically belonging to the family Actiniidae. This classification places it within the kingdom Animalia. Further, it is classified as follows: kingdom Animalia, phylum Cnidaria, class Anthozoa, order Actiniaria, family Actiniidae, genus Edwardsia, and species E. tetraptera. Within the Actiniidae family, Edwardsia tetraptera is a distinct genus. The classification is based on its morphological and anatomical characteristics, such as its body structure and stinging cells.

The plant is said to possess anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which are believed to aid in the treatment of various health conditions.
